scripts.dev: npm run build -w @agent-console/shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @agent-console/server" "npm run dev -w @agent-console/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agent-console/shared && npm run build -w @agent-console/server && npm run build -w @agent-console/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @agent-console/shared && npm run test -w @agent-console/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @agent-console/shared && npm run typecheck -w @agent-console/server && npm run typecheck -w @agent-console/web
